reviews.review_description: I wish more people played! This is not really a first person shooter. It’s more of a tower defense type game. Even if there’s no one else on you can play bots or do challenges. Just get it so I’m not lonely 😩

This game is incredible, it's a full fledged moba in VR. It takes the core principles of other mobas and makes them work for VR. The aiming is extremely satisfying, all the hero's are unique and well balanced, and the game plays very well on quest. This is a cross platform VR moba that hits all marks to be a perfect game.

reviews.review_title: Designed for VR from the ground up.
reviews.review_description: Excellent team based battle arena style game. Recommend getting some friends to play with or checking in on the Discord. There are some friendly people on there who can show you the ropes. The solo dev is very responsive too, and putting out lots of updates and balance changes. He’s some kind of machine!
So much depth with the mechanics and the 14 heroes already in the game. Dev is planning to add even more heroes and a new map! And it's free.

This is my FAVORITE game on the quest. Hidden gem for sure. Once you understand the mechanics behind the game there is a TON of replay-ability here. The bots and match settings can be scaled to provide challenges for even the most experienced (turn on modifiers and then use arrow buttons to set them up)! The VR mechanics for this game feel super tight and responsive, and the hero abilities are very varied. It's worth watching the 5 min tutorial vid to get the basics. It's even better and a completely different game when you get some people together to play pvp, but even against bots I find myself coming back again and again to setup challenging matches. Don't let the visuals fool you, there's a lot of game here. Can't believe it was developed by one guy.  There's a ton of customizability. so if you don't like how the control settings are (button mappings, smooth vs teleportation, HMD driven vs not, you can basically change anything. The HUD too is super customizable.   Supports multiple refresh rates in game as well, up to 120hz.  

This could be an amazing competitive e-sports game if the right people find it and start making it known. The quest is sitting on a possible gold mine here and doesn't realize it. There was a tournament earlier last year and the battles were pretty intense! 

Piece of advice, don't start with Azure or FRED, they look cool but their mechanics are entirely different from the other characters. Better to learn the basics with one of the other heroes first, so you can appreciate how those two heroes deviate from the norm.

This game is a GEM. It has it all. Whether its PvP or player vs bots. WoT has it. Challenging and rewarding gameplay, button mapping, 10 plus unique characters, 2 different maps, in game voice chat, crossplay with steam, and an amazing discord community WOT HAS IT.
The death screen and gameplay review is literally the best I've ever seen. Synergy between characters is what makes this game great. Strategy and skills are what make this game AWESOME!
This game is a great and idea and works well but there is no one playing online and the game looks awful on the quest
This game is so good, being the only vr moba doesn’t change the fact that this gives such an amazing perspective on mobas. And then who can argue with the price, Free! Everyone should check this out
The game is very immersive and runs smoothly!!! Hours of gameplay and fun with friends.  Would highly recommend playing!!!
Great game but needs more players online so you should download it
I’ve literally never cared about mobas before but dang this game really has something going. Keep up the good work!
